items.name: Bruschetta al Pomodoro
items.description: Grilled sourdough rubbed with garlic, topped with fresh heirloom tomatoes, basil, and a drizzle of extra virgin olive oil.

items.name: Burrata e Prosciutto
items.description: Creamy burrata served alongside thinly sliced prosciutto di Parma, roasted cherry tomatoes, and aged balsamic.

items.name: Calamari Fritti
items.description: Lightly breaded and fried squid rings served with our house-made marinara and lemon aioli.

items.name: Zuppa di Cozze
items.description: Prince Edward Island mussels steamed in white wine, garlic, shallots, fresh thyme, and crushed tomato. Served with grilled focaccia.

items.name: Arancini
items.description: Three golden risotto balls filled with mozzarella and peas, served with spicy arrabbiata dipping sauce.

items.name: Caesar Classico
items.description: Romaine hearts, house-made Caesar dressing, shaved Parmigiano-Reggiano, and house-baked croutons. Add grilled chicken +$5, shrimp +$7.

items.name: Insalata della Casa
items.description: Mixed field greens, candied walnuts, dried cranberries, shaved fennel, and Gorgonzola with a honey-lemon vinaigrette.

items.name: Panzanella
items.description: Tuscan bread salad with heirloom tomatoes, cucumber, red onion, capers, fresh basil, and a sherry vinegar dressing.

items.name: Minestrone
items.description: Seasonal vegetables, cannellini beans, and ditalini pasta in a rich tomato-herb broth. Topped with a drizzle of basil oil.

items.name: Zuppa di Lenticchie
items.description: Slow-cooked Umbrian lentil soup with smoked pancetta, rosemary, and a squeeze of lemon.

categories.name: Paste (Pastas)
categories.note: All pastas are house-made. Gluten-free pasta substitute available for +$3.

items.name: Cacio e Pepe
items.description: Our most beloved dish. Roman-style pasta tossed with Pecorino Romano, cracked black pepper, and a touch of butter. Simple. Perfect.

items.name: Rigatoni all'Amatriciana
items.description: Rigatoni with guanciale, San Marzano tomatoes, Pecorino Romano, and a pinch of Calabrian chili.

items.name: Tagliatelle al Ragù Bolognese
items.description: Slow-braised beef and pork ragù over egg tagliatelle, finished with Parmigiano-Reggiano. Four hours in the making.

items.name: Linguine alle Vongole
items.description: Littleneck clams, white wine, garlic, cherry tomatoes, and fresh parsley over linguine.

items.name: Gnocchi al Pesto
items.description: Hand-rolled potato gnocchi with classic Genovese basil pesto, green beans, and potatoes.

items.name: Pappardelle ai Funghi
items.description: Wide egg pappardelle with a wild mushroom (porcini, shiitake, cremini) ragù, fresh thyme, and truffle oil.

items.name: Lasagna della Nonna
items.description: Layers of house-made pasta, slow-cooked Bolognese, béchamel, and Parmigiano-Reggiano. A recipe passed down three generations.

categories.name: Pizze (Wood-Fired Pizzas)
categories.note: All pizzas are 12-inch, baked in our 800°F wood-fired oven. Gluten-free crust available for +$4.

items.name: Margherita
items.description: San Marzano tomato sauce, fresh fior di latte mozzarella, fresh basil, and extra virgin olive oil. The classic.

items.name: Quattro Formaggi
items.description: Mozzarella, Gorgonzola, Taleggio, and Parmigiano-Reggiano with a drizzle of honey and fresh thyme.

items.name: Diavola
items.description: San Marzano tomato, mozzarella, spicy Calabrian salami, Castelvetrano olives, and fresh basil.

items.name: Prosciutto e Rucola
items.description: Mozzarella, prosciutto di Parma, wild arugula, shaved Parmigiano, and a lemon-olive oil drizzle.

items.name: Pizza Bianca ai Funghi
items.description: No tomato sauce. Truffle crema base, wild mushrooms, mozzarella, caramelized onion, and fresh thyme.

items.name: Pollo alla Cacciatore
items.description: Braised free-range chicken thighs with olives, capers, San Marzano tomatoes, white wine, and rosemary. Served with creamy polenta.

items.name: Branzino al Forno
items.description: Whole roasted Mediterranean sea bass with lemon, capers, garlic, fresh herbs, and a drizzle of Sicilian olive oil. Served with roasted vegetables.

items.name: Tagliata di Manzo
items.description: Sliced 8oz grilled ribeye over a bed of arugula with cherry tomatoes, shaved Parmigiano, and truffle oil. Served with roasted potatoes.

items.name: Melanzane alla Parmigiana
items.description: Layers of fried eggplant, San Marzano tomato sauce, mozzarella, and Parmigiano-Reggiano, baked until golden.

items.name: Osso Buco alla Milanese
items.description: Slow-braised veal shank with gremolata, served over saffron risotto. Our weekend special — available Friday and Saturday only.

items.name: Tiramisù
items.description: Classic tiramisù made with house-espresso-soaked ladyfingers, mascarpone cream, and a generous dusting of dark cocoa.

items.name: Panna Cotta al Miele
items.description: Vanilla panna cotta with local Fredericksburg honey, macerated strawberries, and crushed amaretti.

items.name: Cannoli Siciliani
items.description: Two crispy cannoli shells filled with house-made ricotta cream, chocolate chips, and candied orange peel.

items.name: Gelato del Giorno
items.description: Three scoops of our house-made gelato. Flavors rotate daily — ask your server. Today's flavors are posted on the board.

items.name: Torta al Cioccolato
items.description: Warm flourless chocolate cake with Valrhona 70% cocoa, served with vanilla gelato and raspberry coulis.

items.name: Fresh-Squeezed Lemonade
items.description: Made daily with Amalfi-inspired herbs

items.name: Italian Sodas
items.description: Blood orange, elderflower, or Sicilian lemon

items.name: House-Brewed Iced Tea
items.description: Peach or classic
